_provenance: SMGP 'living world' dispatch corpus (Task 4), reactive in-world news stories for the SEGA Super Monaco GP replica mode. Rendered by SmgpDispatchCorpus with a deterministic PCG32 stream (masterSeed + round), so a career shows the same dispatches on every open and on replay. DISPLAY-ONLY, never a fold input (like rival-quotes.json + the news corpora). Voice: bold, colorful, retro-arcade sports-tabloid, the World Championship circus, the hairpin, the big board, the rival ladder, the D.P. board. ASCII punctuation ONLY (no em-dash/curly-quote mojibake). Templates keyed by dispatch id ('milestone.*', 'setback.*', 'world.*'); {pool:name} expands to one interchangeable fragment. Tokens: {player} {team} {rival} {venue} {season} {number} {subject} {other} {leader} {benchmark}. Unknown tokens render empty (the corpus-consistency test guards the shipped set).

cheer: The grandstand is on its feet.
The pit crew dances on the wall.
The circus has a new favourite tonight.
The rivals go quiet; the garage goes wild.
groan: The crowd's cheer curdles to a groan.
The big board tells the cruel story.
One to shake off before the next circuit.
The garage wheels the car away with long faces.
mourning: Flags fly at half-mast over the pit lane.
The SEGA world will not forget this name.
A hush settles over the big board.
The circus stops, and remembers one of its own.
rumor: Word on the pit wall is that {benchmark} has never looked more untouchable at the top of the ladder.
The paddock is whispering about who dares name {benchmark} at the next round.
Talk in the transporters: {leader} leads the D.P. board, but the hairpin forgives nobody.
The mechanics are betting on a shake-up in the LEVEL boards before the circus leaves town.
They say the seat-swap whispers are louder than the engines this week.
A rumor drifts down the pit lane: someone on the grid has {player}'s name circled on their challenge list.
The odds-makers can't split the front of the ladder, and the paddock loves it.
Overheard at the hairpin: the rookies think the old guard is ripe for the taking.
The rumor mill says {leader} is the one everyone is measuring themselves against now.
Chatter in the garages: the D.P. board is tighter than it has been in seasons.

milestone.arrived: {pool:dateline} {player} joins the SMGP world with {team} - a number on the car and everything still to prove. The ladder does not know the name yet. It will.
{pool:dateline} A new challenger steps into the circus: {player}, in {team} colours, with the whole grid a stranger. Season {season} of the long climb begins.
milestone.first-start: {pool:dateline} Lights out on the first race of {player}'s career! The SMGP world gets its first look at the newcomer in the {team} car. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} {player} takes the first green flag of a career for {team}. Everyone starts somewhere; this is where the story begins.
milestone.first-points: {pool:dateline} FIRST D.P. ON THE BOARD! {player} banks championship points for the very first time, and the {team} tally finally reads more than zero. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} {player} is on the championship board at last - the first D.P. of the career safely in the bag for {team}. A climb has to start somewhere.
milestone.first-top5: {pool:dateline} INTO THE TOP FIVE! {player} cracks the sharp end of the field for the first time in {team} colours. The ladder recalculates. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} A first top-five finish for {player}! The {team} car ran with the front-runners today, and the paddock took note.
milestone.first-pole: {pool:dateline} POLE POSITION! {player} is fastest of all in qualifying for the very first time, the {team} machine top of the timing screens. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} {player} plants the {team} car on pole - a maiden fastest lap when it mattered most. The front row belongs to the newcomer today.
milestone.first-podium: {pool:dateline} THE ROSTRUM AT LAST! {player} takes a first career podium for {team}, champagne and all. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} {player} climbs onto the podium for the first time in {team} colours - a maiden top-three the whole garage will remember. {pool:cheer}
milestone.first-win: {pool:dateline} {player} WINS! The first victory of a career, and the SMGP world will remember this one. The {team} car took the flag first, and a name is made. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} MAIDEN VICTORY FOR {player}! Flag to flag, no argument, the big board glowing {team} all afternoon. The ladder trembles at the arrival of a winner. {pool:cheer}
milestone.season: {pool:dateline} Season {season} of {player}'s campaign opens with {team}. The long climb toward the summit rolls on, one circuit at a time.
{pool:dateline} A fresh season begins for {player} at {team} - number {season} of the great campaign, and the challenge-lists reset for another assault.
milestone.promotion: {pool:dateline} {player} MOVES UP THE LADDER! A rung climbed, a better seat earned - {team} welcome a driver on the rise. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} PROMOTION for {player}! The SMGP world's seat-swap whispers came true, and {team} colours are the reward for the climb. {pool:cheer}
milestone.title: {pool:dateline} CHAMPION! {player} takes the Season {season} crown for {team}, the name struck into the record board for good. From the first flag to the last, the D.P. board bent to one driver. {pool:cheer}

{pool:dateline} THE TITLE IS {player}'S! A whole season of the World Championship circus answered with a right foot that would not be denied. {team} triumphant, and the summit a step closer. {pool:cheer}
milestone.rivalry-won: {pool:dateline} {player} TAKES THE SERIES against {rival} - and the offer of a seat is on the table! The ladder swings the newcomer's way, and {rival} can only watch. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} The duel is settled: {player} has {rival}'s number, the series done and dusted, and a rung up the ladder beckons. The paddock marks the date. {pool:cheer}
milestone.finale: {pool:dateline} SEVENTEEN CONQUERED! {player} reaches the summit of the entire campaign for {team} - the SMGP world will speak of this run for a generation. {pool:cheer}
{pool:dateline} THE FINAL RECKONING IS {player}'S! Seventeen seasons survived, the long climb complete, and the big board goes dark on a legend. {pool:cheer}
setback.demotion: {pool:dateline} DROPPED A RUNG. {player} loses the seat and falls to {team} - the ladder is a cruel master, and it climbs both ways. {pool:groan}
{pool:dateline} A hard day for {player}: forced down the ladder into {team}, the seat that could not be held. The climb starts again from lower down. {pool:groan}
setback.rivalry-lost: {pool:dateline} {rival} TAKES THE SERIES! The fight is lost, and {player} pays the price for it. {pool:groan}
{pool:dateline} The battle turns cruel: {rival} takes the series against {player} and collects the spoils. The rival ladder shows no mercy today. {pool:groan}
setback.near-miss: {pool:dateline} ON THE BRINK. {player} sits one loss from the LEVEL D floor - one more defeat down here and the career is over. The whole paddock can feel it. {pool:groan}
{pool:dateline} The floor looms for {player}: another battle lost at LEVEL D and the SMGP dream ends. Nerves of steel required from here. {pool:groan}
setback.career-over: {pool:dateline} THE FLOOR CLAIMS ANOTHER. {player} is out of the SMGP World Championship - the floor gave no more chances, and the big board goes dark on the dream. {pool:groan}
{pool:dateline} It is over for {player}: knocked out of the SMGP world at the very bottom, the campaign ended before its summit. {pool:groan}
setback.injured: {pool:dateline} {player} IS HURT. A crash pitches the {team} car into the barriers and leaves the driver battered - sidelined while the injuries mend. {pool:groan}
{pool:dateline} A heavy shunt for {player}: carried from the wreck and ruled out of the coming rounds. The {team} seat waits for its driver to heal. {pool:groan}
setback.season-ending-injury: {pool:dateline} SEASON OVER IN THE BARRIERS. {player}'s campaign ends in the wall - a crash bad enough to close out the year. The {team} car waits until next season for its driver. {pool:groan}
{pool:dateline} The barriers claim {player}'s season: an accident too severe to come back from this year. The climb pauses, but the driver will return. {pool:groan}
setback.died: {pool:dateline} TRAGEDY. {player} has been killed in an accident here. The SMGP world loses one of its own, and the circus falls silent. {pool:mourning}
{pool:dateline} The darkest day: {player} lost their life in the crash. The big board goes dark, and the paddock mourns a driver taken too soon. {pool:mourning}
world.rival-streak: {pool:dateline} {subject} MAKES IT {number} IN A ROW! The {venue} win extends a run that has the whole ladder on notice. The rest of the grid can only chase.
{pool:dateline} UNSTOPPABLE: {subject} banks a {number}th straight victory at {venue}. The paddock is running out of ways to describe it.
{pool:dateline} {subject} wins AGAIN at {venue} - that's {number} on the bounce. The challenge-lists are being torn up and rewritten.
world.benchmark: {pool:dateline} THE BENCHMARK REASSERTS ITSELF. {subject} wins once more at {venue}, and the message to the grid is the same as it ever was: catch me if you can.
{pool:dateline} {subject} reminds everyone who sets the standard, taking {venue} with the ruthless ease the whole ladder measures itself against.
{pool:dateline} Normal service at the top: {subject} wins at {venue}, untouchable as ever, the bar every challenger is trying to clear.
world.leader-change: {pool:dateline} NEW LEADER OF THE D.P. BOARD! {subject} seizes the top of the World Championship from {other}. The title race has a new face out front.
{pool:dateline} The championship changes hands: {subject} takes the lead of the D.P. board off {other} at {venue}. The big board flashes a new name at the summit.
{pool:dateline} {subject} is the new championship leader after {venue}, wrestling the top spot away from {other}. The pursuit begins anew.
world.title-tightens: {pool:dateline} THE TITLE RACE TIGHTENS! Just {number} D.P. now split leader {subject} and {other} with the season running short. The big board holds its breath.
{pool:dateline} It is knife-edge at the top: {subject} leads {other} by a mere {number} on the D.P. board, and every remaining round is a final. The circus loves it.
{pool:dateline} {number} points. That is all that separates {subject} and {other} at the head of the championship now. The run-in will decide everything.
world.standings-move: {pool:dateline} {subject} TAKES SECOND OFF {other}! A move up the D.P. board at {venue} reshuffles the podium of the championship.
{pool:dateline} The second-place battle turns over: {subject} climbs past {other} into P2 of the standings after {venue}. The chase for the leader has a new challenger.
{pool:dateline} {subject} muscles into second on the D.P. board, {other} bumped down after {venue}. The order behind the leader is anything but settled.
